ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "collection_month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month when the invoice was collected */,
  "collection_year" INTEGER /* Year when the invoice was collected */,
  "collection_month_number" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the collection month */,
  "imp_code" INTEGER /* Code for the International Merchant Purchase (IMP) */,
  "imp_name" TEXT /* Name of the International Merchant Purchase (IMP) */,
  "dpu_code" TEXT /* Code for the Domestic Merchant Purchase (DMU) */,
  "dpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the Domestic Merchant Purchase (DMU) */,
  "invoice_country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the invoice */,
  "invoice_account_number" TEXT /* Account number for the invoice */,
  "invoice_account_name" TEXT /* Account name for the invoice */,
  "origin_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the origin */,
  "destination_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the destination */,
  "division_code" TEXT /* Code for the division handling the invoice */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code for the product */,
  "product_family_description" TEXT /* Description of the product family */,
  "invoice_account_city" TEXT /* City for the invoice account */,
  "invoice_account_state" TEXT /* State for the invoice account */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "total_net_charge_euro" REAL /* Total net charge in Euros */,
  "real_weight_kg" REAL /* Actual weight of the shipment in kilograms */,
  "payweight_kg" REAL /* Weight used for payment calculation in kilograms */,
  "pieces" INTEGER /* Number of pieces in the shipment */,
  "consignments" INTEGER /* Number of consignments */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was created */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the invoice (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for conversion to the invoiced currency */,
  "total_gross_charge" REAL /* Total gross charge before any discounts or taxes */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the invoice */,
  "total_tax" REAL /* Total tax applied to the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "customs_clearance_status" TEXT /* Status of customs clearance (e.g., cleared, pending) */,
  "customs_duty" REAL /* Customs duty amount */,
  "customs_documents" TEXT /* JSON column to store any additional documents required for customs */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the invoice */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_division_code FOREIGN KEY ("division_code") REFERENCES divisions ("division_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_destination_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("destination_country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_origin_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("origin_country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_imp_code FOREIGN KEY ("imp_code") REFERENCES imp_details ("imp_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_invoice_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_dpu_code FOREIGN KEY ("dpu_code") REFERENCES dpu_details ("dpu_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "imp_details" (
  "imp_code" INTEGER /* Code for the International Merchant Purchase (IMP) */,
  "imp_name" TEXT /* Name of the International Merchant Purchase (IMP) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the IMP */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the IMP */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the IMP */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID or VAT number for the IMP */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for the IMP */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IMP was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IMP was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imp_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "dpu_details" (
  "dpu_code" TEXT /* Code for the Domestic Merchant Purchase (DMU) */,
  "dpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the Domestic Merchant Purchase (DMU) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the DMU */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the DPU */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the DPU */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID or VAT number for the DPU */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for the DPU */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the DPU was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the DPU was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dpu_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., AE, IQ) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_code" TEXT /* Code for the division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the division headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the division */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code for the product */,
  "product_family_description" TEXT /* Description of the product family */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight_limit" REAL /* Maximum weight limit for the product */,
  "volume_limit" REAL /* Maximum volume limit for the product */,
  "hazardous_material" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is hazardous */,
  "customs_description" TEXT /* Description used for customs documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, finance, operations) */,
  "division_code" TEXT /* Code for the division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_division_code FOREIGN KEY ("division_code") REFERENCES divisions ("division_code")
)
